---
title: "chondrocytes_dexamethasone"
output: html_document
date: "2025-05-13"
---

```{r bodyclocks_setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
source(file.path("..", "R", "io_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "annotation_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "biomart_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "string_utils.R"))
source(file.path("..", "R", "validation_utils.R"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "tables"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "reports"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "mouse"))
ensure_dir(file.path("..", "results", "shiny_data", "baboon"))
```

```{r libraries}

library(sva)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(rain)
library(biomaRt)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(STRINGdb)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
```


```{r load_data}

count_matrix <- read.delim("data/raw/dex_raw.csv", header=T, sep=",", row.names=1)

# remove column dex_24h_b which is an outlier
count_matrix <- count_matrix %>% dplyr::select(-dex_28h_b)

# The dataset had batch effect so had to remove it before running DESeq2
batch <- c(rep(1, 12), rep(2, 11), rep(3, 12))
group <- c(1:12, 1:6, 8:12, 1:12)
print(group)

adjusted <- ComBat_seq(as.matrix(count_matrix), batch=batch, group=group)
```


```{r deseq2_normalization}
# DESeq2 processing
sampletable <- read.table("data/meta/dex_meta.csv", header=T, sep=",", row.names=1)

dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = adjusted,
                              colData = sampletable,
                              design = ~ time)

dds <- dds [rowMeans(counts(dds)) >= 50, ]

dds$condition <- factor(dds$time, levels = c("4h", "8h", "12h", "16h", "20h", "24h", "28h", "32h", "36h", "40h", "44h", "48h"))
dds1 <- DESeq(dds)

vsd <- vst(dds1, blind=FALSE)
data_order <- c("4h", "8h", "12h", "16h", "20h", "24h", "28h", "32h", "36h", "40h", "44h", "48h")
vsd$time <- factor(vsd$time, levels = data_order)

```


```{r run_rain_annotate}
# RAIN circadian analysis

dex <- assay(vsd)
#dex <- counts(dds1, normalized=TRUE)
col_names <- c("dex_04h_a", "dex_08h_a", "dex_12h_a", "dex_16h_a", "dex_20h_a", "dex_24h_a", "dex_28h_a", "dex_32h_a", "dex_36h_a", "dex_40h_a", "dex_44h_a", "dex_48h_a", "dex_04h_b", "dex_08h_b", "dex_12h_b", "dex_16h_b", "dex_20h_b", "dex_24h_b", "dex_32h_b", "dex_36h_b", "dex_40h_b", "dex_44h_b", "dex_48h_b", "dex_04h_c", "dex_08h_c", "dex_12h_c", "dex_16h_c", "dex_20h_c", "dex_24h_c", "dex_28h_c", "dex_32h_c", "dex_36h_c", "dex_40h_c", "dex_44h_c", "dex_48h_c")
colnames(dex) <- col_names
dex <- dex[, order(colnames(dex))]

dex_RAIN <- rain(t(dex), deltat=4, period=24, measure.sequence = c(3,3,3,3,3,2,3,3,3,3,3,3),
                peak.border=c(0.3, 0.7), method = "longitudinal" , adjp.method='ABH', verbose=TRUE) # independent for mouse sampling,

p_values_dex <- dex_RAIN$pVal

dex_RAIN$BH.Q <- p.adjust(p_values_dex, method = "BH")

norm_counts <- counts(dds1, normalized=TRUE)
dex_circ <- merge(norm_counts, dex_RAIN, by = 0, all.x = TRUE)

# Remove .xx from the Row.names column
dex_circ$Row.names <- gsub("\\..*", "", dex_circ$Row.names)

# Set up the Ensembl BioMart connection
ensembl <- connect_biomart("mmusculus_gene_ensembl")

# Query Ensembl BioMart to get gene descriptions
gene_info <- get_biomart_annotation(
  ids = dex_circ$Row.names,
  mart = ensembl,
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol", "external_gene_name", "description"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  cache_key = "dexamethasone_gene_info"
)

# Prioritize MGI symbols, fall back to external_gene_name only if needed
gene_info <- gene_info %>%
  mutate(preferred_symbol = ifelse(!is.na(mgi_symbol) & mgi_symbol != "", 
                                  mgi_symbol, 
                                  external_gene_name))

# Ensure unique entries in gene_info
gene_info <- gene_info[!duplicated(gene_info$external_gene_name), ]

# Remove text within square brackets, including the brackets themselves
gene_info$description <- gsub("\\[.*?\\]", "", gene_info$description)

# Trim any trailing whitespace that might be left
gene_info$description <- trimws(gene_info$description)

merged <- merge(dex_circ, gene_info, by.x = "Row.names", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)
write.csv(merged, file = "results/tables/dex_circ.csv")
```


```{r prepare_heatmap}
# Prepare data frame for heatmap
metadata <- read.csv("data/meta/dex_meta.csv")
rownames(metadata) <- metadata$sample

dex_05 <- subset(merged, BH.Q <= 0.05)
dex_05 <- dex_05[order(dex_05$phase),]
rownames(dex_05) <- dex_05[,1]
dex_05 <- subset(dex_05, select = -c(Row.names, external_gene_name, description, pVal, phase, peak.shape, period, BH.Q, mgi_symbol, preferred_symbol))
col_names3 <- c("04h_A2", "08h_A3", "12h_A4", "16h_A5", "20h_A6", "24h_A7", "28h_A8", "32h_A9", "36h_A10", "40h_A11", "44h_A12", "48h_A13", "04h_B2", "08h_B3", "12h_B4", "16h_B5", "20h_B6", "24h_B8", "32h_B9", "36h_B10","40h_B11", "44h_B12","48h_B13", "04h_C2", "08h_C3", "12h_C4", "16h_C5", "20h_C6", "24h_C14", "28h_C8", "32h_C9", "36h_C10", "40h_C11", "44h_C12", "48h_C13")
colnames(dex_05) <- col_names3
dex_05 <- dex_05[, order(names(dex_05))]
df1 <- as.matrix(dex_05)
scaled_df1 <- t(scale(t(df1)))

chm1 <- Heatmap(scaled_df1, name = "dex bhq 0.05", cluster_columns = FALSE, cluster_rows = FALSE, show_row_names = FALSE)

ensure_dir("results/dexamethasone/plots")
pdf(file = "results/dexamethasone/plots/heatmap_dex.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
draw(chm1)
dev.off()

ensure_dir("results/publication_figures")
pdf(file = "results/publication_figures/Fig1B_heatmap_dex.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
draw(chm1)
dev.off()
png(file = "results/publication_figures/Fig1B_heatmap_dex.png", width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", res = 600)
draw(chm1)
dev.off()

```

```{r prepare_string_nodes}
# Get STRING DB interaction data and functional enrichment

nodes_data <- merged %>%
    filter(BH.Q <= 0.05) %>%
    dplyr::rename(symbol = preferred_symbol)


# Get list of gene symbols for STRING API
#gene_list <- nodes_data$symbol

# ENSEMBL gene IDs return more results than MGI symbols
gene_list <- nodes_data$Row.names

# Define STRING API base URL
string_api_url <- "https://string-db.org/api"
output_format <- "json"  # or tsv
species_id <- 10090  # Mus musculus (mouse)
```

```{r prepare_gene_mapping}
# Create comprehensive gene mapping dictionary

# Create the mapping using your existing data
gene_mapping <- create_gene_mapping(
  gene_ids = merged$Row.names,
  symbols = nodes_data$symbol
)

cat("Created mapping for", length(gene_mapping), "genes\n")

# Map STRING preferred names to MGI symbols
```



```{r build_string_network}
# Get protein-protein interactions and enrichment data using STRINGdb

# Function to get protein-protein interactions (edges)


# Function to get selected enrichment data

network_bundle <- get_string_network_bundle(
  gene_list = gene_list,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  species_id = 10090,
  nodes_data = nodes_data
)
edges <- network_bundle$edges_by_threshold
cluster_data <- network_bundle$cluster_data


phase_colors <- c("4" = "orange", "8" = "yellow", "12" = "red", "16" = "purple", "20" = "navy", "24" = "lightblue")

network_outputs <- build_string_network_outputs(
  cluster_data = cluster_data,
  nodes_data = nodes_data,
  gene_info = gene_info,
  gene_mapping = gene_mapping,
  phase_colors = phase_colors)

cluster_data <- network_outputs$cluster_data
cluster_data_export <- cluster_data %>%
  dplyr::mutate(preferredNames = vapply(preferredNames, paste, character(1), collapse = ","))
write.csv(cluster_data_export, file = "results/tables/dex_enrichment.csv", row.names = FALSE)
nodes <- network_outputs$nodes
nodes_with_tooltips <- network_outputs$nodes_with_tooltips
cluster_for_plot <- network_outputs$cluster_for_plot
cluster_descriptions <- network_outputs$cluster_descriptions

save_string_network_outputs(
  outputs = network_outputs,
  edges = edges,
  output_dir = "results/shiny_data/mouse/dex",
  prefix = "dex"
)

```

```{r prepare_timeseries_data}
# Process data frame for plotting in bodyclocks shiny app
df <- subset(merged, select = -c(Row.names, pVal, phase, peak.shape, period, BH.Q, external_gene_name, description, preferred_symbol))
col_names2 <- c("01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12", "01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12", "01", "02", "03", "04", "05", "06", "07", "08", "09", "10", "11", "12","Gene")
colnames(df) <- col_names2
data <- pivot_longer(df, cols = !Gene, names_to = "time_point", values_to = "reads")

qval_df <- merged[c("mgi_symbol", "BH.Q")]
new_pval_names <- c("Gene", "BH.Q")
colnames(qval_df) <- new_pval_names

data <- data[order(data$time_point),]

mean_data <- aggregate(reads ~ Gene + time_point, data, mean)
sd_data <- aggregate(reads ~ Gene + time_point, data, sd)
mean_sd <- merge(mean_data, sd_data, by = c("Gene", "time_point"))
names <- c("Gene", "time_point", "mean", "sd")
colnames(mean_sd) <- names
mean_sd <- inner_join(mean_sd, qval_df, by = "Gene")
save_rds_checked(mean_sd, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/dex/dex_data.rds")
```


```{r compute_amplitude_display_table}
# Prepare data frame for display

dt <- merged %>%
  mutate(ZT4 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("dex_4h_a", "dex_28h_a", "dex_4h_b", "dex_4h_c", "dex_28h_c"))),
         ZT8 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("dex_8h_a", "dex_32h_a", "dex_8h_b", "dex_32h_b", "dex_8h_c", "dex_32h_c"))),
         ZT12 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("dex_12h_a", "dex_36h_a", "dex_12h_b", "dex_36h_b", "dex_12h_c", "dex_36h_c"))),
         ZT16 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("dex_16h_a", "dex_40h_a", "dex_16h_b", "dex_40h_b", "dex_16h_c", "dex_40h_c"))),
         ZT20 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("dex_20h_a", "dex_44h_a", "dex_20h_b", "dex_44h_b", "dex_20h_c", "dex_44h_c"))),
         ZT24 = rowMeans(dplyr::select(., c("dex_24h_a", "dex_48h_a", "dex_24h_b", "dex_48h_b", "dex_24h_c", "dex_48h_c")))
  )

means <- dt[c("ZT4", "ZT8", "ZT12", "ZT16", "ZT20", "ZT24")]

min_val <- apply(means, 1, min)
max_val <- apply(means, 1, max)

Amp_fc_log2 <- log2(max_val / min_val)
Amp_fc <- max_val / min_val

dt <- cbind(dt, Amp_fc_log2, Amp_fc)


display_dt <- dt %>%
  dplyr::select(mgi_symbol, description, pVal, BH.Q, Amp_fc_log2, phase) %>%
  dplyr::rename(symbol = mgi_symbol) %>%
  arrange(BH.Q)

save_rds_checked(display_dt, file = "results/shiny_data/mouse/dex/dex_display_dt.rds")
```
